content: GH #1023 (closed 2025-07-01, fixed in Cognee 0.2.0): search(datasets='dataset_a') leaked results from 'dataset_b' because the repro called cognify() with no datasets filter, merging entities into one shared graph. Fix: ENABLE_BACKEND_ACCESS_CONTROL (on by default since Cognee 0.5.0 per maintainer) provisions physically separate Kuzu/LanceDB storage per dataset. Cognee 1.2.2 postdates the fix by many versions, but exact 1.2.2 default + multi-dataset-cognify-call entity merge behavior not independently confirmed in docs -- must be verified empirically in Phase 1 itself.
